svg.title: SPM platform architecture
svg.desc: Data sources feed into EventBridge which routes to Lambda functions storing results in DynamoDB and S3, delivered via dashboard and alerts

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does GuardDuty do in this project?')
sendPrompt('What does CloudTrail do in this project?')
sendPrompt('What does AWS Config do in this project?')
sendPrompt('What does IAM Access Analyzer do?')
sendPrompt('What does Security Hub do in this project?')
sendPrompt('How does EventBridge routing work in this project?')
sendPrompt('How does the score calculator Lambda work?')
sendPrompt('How does the auto remediator Lambda work?')
sendPrompt('How does the report generator Lambda work?')
sendPrompt('What data is stored in DynamoDB in this project?')
sendPrompt('What is stored in S3 in this project?')
sendPrompt('How does the Streamlit dashboard work?')
sendPrompt('How does SNS alerting work in this project?')
sendPrompt('How are reports delivered in this project?')
